## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (lint + format + test + build).
- [ ] `dist/resource-translator/index.js` is up to date (run `npm run build`).
- [ ] Tests added or updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `docs/`, or both).
- [ ] No new `npm audit` vulnerabilities.
- [ ] Linked to a related issue or discussion (if applicable).
